56: public abstract class ListControlGroups<T> extends Panel {
57: 	private static final long serialVersionUID = 7205285700113097720L;

71: 		super(id, model);
72: 
73: 		typesControlGroups.put(Date.class, DateControlGroup.class);
74: 		typesControlGroups.put(LocalDateTime.class, TemporalControlGroup.class);
75: 		typesControlGroups.put(Temporal.class, TemporalControlGroup.class);
76: 		typesControlGroups.put(String.class, TextFieldControlGroup.class);

80: 		typesControlGroups.put(long.class, TextFieldControlGroup.class);
81: 		typesControlGroups.put(Double.class, TextFieldControlGroup.class);
82: 		typesControlGroups.put(double.class, TextFieldControlGroup.class);
83: 		typesControlGroups.put(BigDecimal.class, TextFieldControlGroup.class);
84: 		typesControlGroups.put(BigInteger.class, TextFieldControlGroup.class);
85: 		typesControlGroups.put(Boolean.class, CheckboxControlGroup.class);
86: 		typesControlGroups.put(boolean.class, CheckboxControlGroup.class);
87: 		typesControlGroups.put(Set.class, CollectionControlGroup.class);
88: 
89: 		objectProperties = new ArrayList<ObjectProperties>();
90: 		this.entitySettings = entitySettings;
91: 		this.renderers = renderers;
92: 	}

94: 	private Set<String> getPropertiesByOrder(Class<?> modelClass) {
95: 		Set<String> properties = new LinkedHashSet<String>();
96: 
97: 		for(String property : entitySettings.getOrderOfFields()){
98: 			if(!entitySettings.getHiddenFields().contains(property))
99: 				properties.add(property);
100: 		}
101: 		for(PropertyDescriptor descriptor : PropertyUtils.getPropertyDescriptors(modelClass)){
102: 			if(!entitySettings.getHiddenFields().contains(descriptor.getName()) &&
103: 			   !properties.contains(descriptor.getName()) &&
104: 			   !descriptor.getName().equals("class"))
105: 				properties.add(descriptor.getName());
106: 		}
107: 
108: 		return properties;
109: 	}
110: 
111: 	protected abstract EntityProvider<?> getEntityProvider(String name);
112: 
113: 	@Override
114: 	protected void onInitialize() {
115: 		super.onInitialize();
116: 
117: 		Class<?> modelClass = getModel().getObject().getClass();
118: 
119: 		Set<String> properties = getPropertiesByOrder(modelClass);
120: 
121: 		Validator validator = HibernateValidatorProperty.validatorFactory.getValidator();
122: 		BeanDescriptor constraintDescriptors = validator.getConstraintsForClass(modelClass);
123: 		for(String property : properties){
124: 			PropertyDescriptor descriptor;
125: 			try {
126: 				descriptor = PropertyUtils.getPropertyDescriptor(getModel().getObject(), property);
127: 			} catch (Exception e) {
128: 				throw new RuntimeException("error getting property "+property, e);
129: 			}
130: 
131: 			boolean required = false;
132: 
133: 			ElementDescriptor constraintDescriptor = constraintDescriptors.getConstraintsForProperty(descriptor.getName());
134: 			if(constraintDescriptor!=null){
135: 				Set<ConstraintDescriptor<?>> constraintsSet = constraintDescriptor.getConstraintDescriptors();
136: 				for(ConstraintDescriptor<?> constraint : constraintsSet){
137: 					if(constraint.getAnnotation() instanceof NotNull ||
138: 					   constraint.getAnnotation() instanceof NotEmpty ||
139: 					   constraint.getAnnotation() instanceof NotBlank)
140: 						required = true;
141: 				}
142: 			}
143: 
144: 			objectProperties.add(new ObjectProperties(descriptor, required));
145: 		}
146: 		
147: 		RepeatingView view = new RepeatingView("controlGroup");
148: 		for(ObjectProperties objectProperty : objectProperties){
149: 			try {
150: 				AbstractControlGroup<?> controlGroup;
151: 				if(!controlGroupProviders.containsKey(objectProperty.type)) {
152: 					Constructor<?> constructor;
153: 					Class<? extends Panel> typesControlGroup = getControlGroupByType(objectProperty.type);
154: 					if(typesControlGroup==null){
155: 						if(objectProperty.type.isEnum()) typesControlGroup = EnumControlGroup.class;
156: 						else typesControlGroup = ObjectChoiceControlGroup.class;
157: 					}
158: 
159: 					constructor = typesControlGroup.getConstructor(String.class, IModel.class);
160: 
161: 					controlGroup = (AbstractControlGroup<?>) constructor.newInstance(view.newChildId(), new PropertyModel<Object>(ListControlGroups.this.getModel(), objectProperty.name));
162: 					controlGroup.init(objectProperty.name, getResourceBase(), objectProperty.required, objectProperty.type, entitySettings);
163: 					controlGroup.setEnabled(objectProperty.enabled);
164: 
165: 
166: 					if(typesControlGroup==ObjectChoiceControlGroup.class){
167: 						IObjectRenderer<?> renderer = renderers.get(objectProperty.type);
168: 						if(renderer==null){
169: 							renderer = new IObjectRenderer<Object>() {
170: 								private static final long serialVersionUID = -6171655578529011405L;
171: 
172: 								public String render(Object object) {
173: 									return object.toString();
174: 								}
175: 							};
176: 						}
177: 						((ObjectChoiceControlGroup<?>) controlGroup).setConfiguration(getEntityProvider(objectProperty.name), renderer);
178: 					} else if(typesControlGroup==CollectionControlGroup.class){
179: 						((CollectionControlGroup<?>) controlGroup).setConfiguration(getEntityProvider(objectProperty.name), renderers);
180: 					}
181: 
182: 				} else {
183: 					controlGroup = controlGroupProviders
184: 							.get(objectProperty.type)
185: 							.createControlGroup(view.newChildId()
186: 									, new PropertyModel<Object>(ListControlGroups.this.getModel(), objectProperty.name)
187: 									, objectProperty.name, getResourceBase(), objectProperty.required, objectProperty.type, entitySettings);
188: 				}
189: 				view.add(controlGroup);
190: 
191: 				fieldComponents.put(objectProperty.name, controlGroup);
192: 			} catch (SecurityException e) {
193: 				throw new RuntimeException(e);
194: 			} catch (NoSuchMethodException e) {
195: 				throw new RuntimeException(e);
196: 			} catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
197: 				throw new RuntimeException(e);
198: 			} catch (InstantiationException e) {
199: 				throw new RuntimeException(e);
200: 			} catch (IllegalAccessException e) {
201: 				throw new RuntimeException(e);
202: 			} catch (InvocationTargetException e) {
203: 				throw new RuntimeException(e);
204: 			}
205: 		}
206: 
207: 		add(view);
208: 	}

216: 		return this;

220: 		return Collections.unmodifiableMap(fieldComponents);
221: 	}

224: 	private Class<? extends AbstractControlGroup> getControlGroupByType(Class<?> type){
225: 		for(Class<?> mapType : typesControlGroups.keySet()){
226: 			if(type.isAssignableFrom(mapType)) return typesControlGroups.get(mapType);
227: 		}
228: 		return null;
229: 	}
230: 
231: 	private static final class ObjectProperties implements Serializable {
232: 		private static final long serialVersionUID = 1747577998897955928L;
233: 		private String name;

235: 		private Class<?> type;
236: 		private boolean required;
237: 
238: 		public ObjectProperties(PropertyDescriptor descriptor, boolean required){
239: 			this.name = descriptor.getName();
240: 			this.enabled = descriptor.getWriteMethod()!=null;
241: 			this.type = descriptor.getPropertyType();
242: 			this.required = required;
243: 		}
244: 	}
245: 
246: 	@SuppressWarnings("rawtypes")
247: 	public Map<Class<?>, Class<? extends AbstractControlGroup>> getControlGroupsTypesMap(){
248: 		return typesControlGroups;
249: 	}

251: 	public Map<Class<?>, ControlGroupProvider<? extends AbstractControlGroup<?>>> getControlGroupProviders(){
252: 		return this.controlGroupProviders;

<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
	<modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

	<groupId>com.premiumminds</groupId>
	<artifactId>wicket-crudifier</artifactId>
	<version>5.1-SNAPSHOT</version>
	<packaging>jar</packaging>

	<name>wicket-crudifier</name>
	<description>wicket-crudifier is a library to easily create CRUD's with wicket</description>
	<inceptionYear>2014</inceptionYear>

	<organization>
		<name>Premium Minds</name>
		<url>http://www.premium-minds.com</url>
	</organization>

	<licenses>
		<license>
			<name>GNU LESSER GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE</name>
			<url>http://www.gnu.org/licenses/lgpl.html</url>
		</license>
	</licenses>

	<url>https://github.com/premium-minds/wicket-crudifier</url>

	<scm>
		<url>https://github.com/premium-minds/wicket-crudifier</url>
		<connection>scm:git:git@github.com:premium-minds/wicket-crudifier.git</connection>
		<developerConnection>scm:git:git@github.com:premium-minds/wicket-crudifier.git</developerConnection>
		<tag>HEAD</tag>
	</scm>

	<developers>
		<developer>
			<name>André Camilo</name>
			<organization>Premium Minds</organization>
		</developer>
		<developer>
			<name>Filipe Roque</name>
			<organization>Premium Minds</organization>
		</developer>
	</developers>

	<properties>
		<wicket.version>9.14.0</wicket.version>
		<project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
		<java.version>11</java.version>
	</properties>

	<dependencies>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.apache.wicket</groupId>
			<artifactId>wicket-core</artifactId>
			<version>${wicket.version}</version>
			<scope>provided</scope>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.apache.wicket</groupId>
			<artifactId>wicket-extensions</artifactId>
			<version>${wicket.version}</version>
			<scope>provided</scope>
		</dependency>

		<dependency>
			<groupId>com.premiumminds</groupId>
			<artifactId>pm-wicket-utils</artifactId>
			<version>5.0</version>
		</dependency>

		<dependency>
			<groupId>com.premiumminds</groupId>
			<artifactId>pm-wicket-utils-testing</artifactId>
			<version>5.0</version>
			<scope>test</scope>
		</dependency>

		<dependency>
			<groupId>commons-beanutils</groupId>
			<artifactId>commons-beanutils</artifactId>
			<version>1.9.4</version>
		</dependency>

		<dependency>
			<groupId>jakarta.validation</groupId>
			<artifactId>jakarta.validation-api</artifactId>
			<version>3.0.2</version>
			<scope>provided</scope>
		</dependency>

		<!-- TEST DEPENDENCIES -->
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.junit.jupiter</groupId>
			<artifactId>junit-jupiter</artifactId>
			<version>5.9.3</version>
			<scope>test</scope>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>jakarta.servlet</groupId>
			<artifactId>jakarta.servlet-api</artifactId>
			<version>4.0.4</version>
			<scope>test</scope>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.easymock</groupId>
			<artifactId>easymock</artifactId>
			<version>5.1.0</version>
			<scope>test</scope>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.hibernate.validator</groupId>
			<artifactId>hibernate-validator</artifactId>
			<version>6.2.0.Final</version>
			<scope>test</scope>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.glassfish</groupId>
			<artifactId>jakarta.el</artifactId>
			<version>3.0.4</version>
			<scope>test</scope>
		</dependency>
	</dependencies>
	<build>
		<plugins>
			<plugin>
				<inherited>true</inherited>
				<groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
				<artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>3.11.0</version>
				<configuration>
					<source>${java.version}</source>
					<target>${java.version}</target>
					<release>${java.version}</release>
					<optimize>true</optimize>
					<debug>true</debug>
				</configuration>
			</plugin>
			<plugin>
				<groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
				<artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>3.1.0</version>
			</plugin>
			<plugin>
				<groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
				<artifactId>maven-source-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>3.3.0</version>
				<executions>
					<execution>
						<id>attach-sources</id>
						<goals>
							<goal>jar-no-fork</goal>
						</goals>
					</execution>
				</executions>
			</plugin>
			<plugin>
				<groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
				<artifactId>maven-javadoc-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>3.5.0</version>
				<executions>
					<execution>
						<id>attach-javadocs</id>
						<goals>
							<goal>jar</goal>
						</goals>
					</execution>
				</executions>
			</plugin>

			<plugin>
				<groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
				<artifactId>maven-jar-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>3.3.0</version>
				<configuration>
					<archive>
						<manifestEntries>
							<Automatic-Module-Name>com.premiumminds.wicket.crudifier</Automatic-Module-Name>
						</manifestEntries>
					</archive>
				</configuration>
			</plugin>

			<plugin>
				<groupId>com.mycila.maven-license-plugin</groupId>
				<artifactId>maven-license-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>1.10.b1</version>
				<configuration>
					<header>licence-preamble.txt</header>
					<strictCheck>true</strictCheck>
					<failIfMissing>true</failIfMissing>
					<includes>
						<include>src/**</include>
						<include>**/test/**</include>
					</includes>
					<excludes>
						<exclude>target/**</exclude>
					</excludes>
					<mapping>
						<yml>SCRIPT_STYLE</yml>
					</mapping>
					<properties>
						<project-name>${project.name}</project-name>
						<year>2014</year>
						<owner>Premium Minds</owner>
					</properties>
				</configuration>
			</plugin>

			<plugin>
				<groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
				<artifactId>maven-release-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>3.0.1</version>
				<configuration>
					<autoVersionSubmodules>true</autoVersionSubmodules>
					<useReleaseProfile>false</useReleaseProfile>
					<releaseProfiles>release</releaseProfiles>
					<tagNameFormat>v@{project.version}</tagNameFormat>
					<goals>deploy</goals>
				</configuration>
				<dependencies>
					<dependency>
						<groupId>org.apache.maven.scm</groupId>
						<artifactId>maven-scm-provider-gitexe</artifactId>
						<version>2.0.0</version>
					</dependency>
					<dependency>
						<groupId>org.apache.maven.scm</groupId>
						<artifactId>maven-scm-api</artifactId>
						<version>2.0.0</version>
					</dependency>
				</dependencies>
			</plugin>
			
			<plugin>
				<groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
				<artifactId>maven-scm-publish-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>3.2.1</version>
				<configuration>
					<checkoutDirectory>${project.build.directory}/scmpublish</checkoutDirectory>
					<checkinComment>Publishing javadoc for ${project.artifactId}:${project.version}</checkinComment>
					<content>${project.reporting.outputDirectory}</content>
					<skipDeletedFiles>true</skipDeletedFiles>
					<pubScmUrl>scm:git:git@github.com:premium-minds/wicket-crudifier.git</pubScmUrl>
					<scmBranch>gh-pages</scmBranch> <!-- branch with static site -->
				</configuration>
			</plugin>
			
		</plugins>

		<resources>
			<resource>
				<directory>src/main/resources</directory>
				<includes>
					<include>**</include>
				</includes>
			</resource>
			<resource>
				<directory>src/main/java</directory>
				<includes>
					<include>**</include>
				</includes>
				<excludes>
					<exclude>**/*.java</exclude>
				</excludes>
			</resource>
		</resources>
	</build>

	<profiles>
		<profile>
			<id>release</id>
			<build>
				<plugins>
					<!-- OSS Sonatype stuff -->
					<plugin>
						<groupId>org.sonatype.plugins</groupId>
						<artifactId>nexus-staging-maven-plugin</artifactId>
						<version>1.6.13</version>
						<extensions>true</extensions>
						<configuration>
							<serverId>premiumminds-nexus-staging</serverId>
							<nexusUrl>https://oss.sonatype.org/</nexusUrl>
							<autoReleaseAfterClose>true</autoReleaseAfterClose>
						</configuration>
					</plugin>
					<plugin>
						<groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
						<artifactId>maven-gpg-plugin</artifactId>
						<version>3.0.1</version>
						<executions>
							<execution>
								<id>sign-artifacts</id>
								<phase>verify</phase>
								<goals>
									<goal>sign</goal>
								</goals>
							</execution>
						</executions>
					</plugin>
				</plugins>
			</build>
		</profile>
	</profiles>

	<distributionManagement>

		<snapshotRepository>
			<id>premiumminds-nexus-snapshots</id>
			<name>premiumminds-nexus-snapshots</name>
			<url>https://oss.sonatype.org/content/repositories/snapshots </url>
			<snapshots>
				<enabled>true</enabled>
			</snapshots>
		</snapshotRepository>

		<repository>
			<id>premiumminds-nexus-staging</id>
			<name>premiumminds-nexus-staging</name>
			<url>https://oss.sonatype.org/service/local/staging/deploy/maven2 </url>
		</repository>

	</distributionManagement>
</project>

				<artifactId>maven-scm-publish-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>3.2.1</version>
				<configuration>
					<checkoutDirectory>${project.build.directory}/scmpublish</checkoutDirectory>
					<checkinComment>Publishing javadoc for ${project.artifactId}:${project.version}</checkinComment>
					<content>${project.reporting.outputDirectory}</content>
					<skipDeletedFiles>true</skipDeletedFiles>
					<pubScmUrl>scm:git:git@github.com:premium-minds/wicket-crudifier.git</pubScmUrl>
					<scmBranch>gh-pages</scmBranch> <!-- branch with static site -->
				</configuration>
			</plugin>
			
		</plugins>

		<resources>
			<resource>
				<directory>src/main/resources</directory>
				<includes>
					<include>**</include>
				</includes>
			</resource>
			<resource>
				<directory>src/main/java</directory>
				<includes>
					<include>**</include>
				</includes>
				<excludes>
					<exclude>**/*.java</exclude>
				</excludes>
			</resource>
		</resources>
	</build>

	<profiles>
		<profile>
			<id>release</id>
			<build>
				<plugins>
					<!-- OSS Sonatype stuff -->
					<plugin>
						<groupId>org.sonatype.plugins</groupId>
						<artifactId>nexus-staging-maven-plugin</artifactId>
						<version>1.6.13</version>
						<extensions>true</extensions>
						<configuration>
							<serverId>premiumminds-nexus-staging</serverId>
							<nexusUrl>https://oss.sonatype.org/</nexusUrl>
							<autoReleaseAfterClose>true</autoReleaseAfterClose>
						</configuration>
					</plugin>
					<plugin>
						<groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
						<artifactId>maven-gpg-plugin</artifactId>
						<version>3.0.1</version>
						<executions>
							<execution>
								<id>sign-artifacts</id>
								<phase>verify</phase>
								<goals>
									<goal>sign</goal>
								</goals>
							</execution>
						</executions>
					</plugin>
				</plugins>
			</build>
		</profile>
	</profiles>

	<distributionManagement>

		<snapshotRepository>
			<id>premiumminds-nexus-snapshots</id>
			<name>premiumminds-nexus-snapshots</name>
			<url>https://oss.sonatype.org/content/repositories/snapshots </url>
			<snapshots>
				<enabled>true</enabled>
			</snapshots>
		</snapshotRepository>

		<repository>
			<id>premiumminds-nexus-staging</id>
			<name>premiumminds-nexus-staging</name>
			<url>https://oss.sonatype.org/service/local/staging/deploy/maven2 </url>
		</repository>

	</distributionManagement>
</project>

	</profiles>

			<url>https://oss.sonatype.org/service/local/staging/deploy/maven2 </url>
		</repository>

	</distributionManagement>
</project>

<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
	<modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

	<groupId>com.premiumminds</groupId>
	<artifactId>wicket-crudifier</artifactId>
	<version>5.1-SNAPSHOT</version>
	<packaging>jar</packaging>

	<name>wicket-crudifier</name>
	<description>wicket-crudifier is a library to easily create CRUD's with wicket</description>
	<inceptionYear>2014</inceptionYear>

	<organization>
		<name>Premium Minds</name>
		<url>http://www.premium-minds.com</url>
	</organization>

	<licenses>
		<license>
			<name>GNU LESSER GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE</name>
			<url>http://www.gnu.org/licenses/lgpl.html</url>
		</license>
	</licenses>

	<url>https://github.com/premium-minds/wicket-crudifier</url>

	<scm>
		<url>https://github.com/premium-minds/wicket-crudifier</url>
		<connection>scm:git:git@github.com:premium-minds/wicket-crudifier.git</connection>
		<developerConnection>scm:git:git@github.com:premium-minds/wicket-crudifier.git</developerConnection>
		<tag>HEAD</tag>
	</scm>

	<developers>
		<developer>
			<name>André Camilo</name>
			<organization>Premium Minds</organization>
		</developer>
		<developer>
			<name>Filipe Roque</name>
			<organization>Premium Minds</organization>
		</developer>
	</developers>

	<properties>
		<wicket.version>9.14.0</wicket.version>
		<project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
		<java.version>11</java.version>
	</properties>

	<dependencies>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.apache.wicket</groupId>
			<artifactId>wicket-core</artifactId>
			<version>${wicket.version}</version>
			<scope>provided</scope>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.apache.wicket</groupId>
			<artifactId>wicket-extensions</artifactId>
			<version>${wicket.version}</version>
			<scope>provided</scope>
		</dependency>

		<dependency>
			<groupId>com.premiumminds</groupId>
			<artifactId>pm-wicket-utils</artifactId>
			<version>5.0</version>
		</dependency>

		<dependency>
			<groupId>com.premiumminds</groupId>
			<artifactId>pm-wicket-utils-testing</artifactId>
			<version>5.0</version>
			<scope>test</scope>
		</dependency>

		<dependency>
			<groupId>commons-beanutils</groupId>
			<artifactId>commons-beanutils</artifactId>
			<version>1.9.4</version>
		</dependency>

		<dependency>
			<groupId>jakarta.validation</groupId>
			<artifactId>jakarta.validation-api</artifactId>
			<version>3.0.2</version>
			<scope>provided</scope>
		</dependency>

		<!-- TEST DEPENDENCIES -->
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.junit.jupiter</groupId>
			<artifactId>junit-jupiter</artifactId>
			<version>5.9.3</version>
			<scope>test</scope>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>jakarta.servlet</groupId>
			<artifactId>jakarta.servlet-api</artifactId>
			<version>4.0.4</version>
			<scope>test</scope>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.easymock</groupId>
			<artifactId>easymock</artifactId>
			<version>5.1.0</version>
			<scope>test</scope>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.hibernate.validator</groupId>
			<artifactId>hibernate-validator</artifactId>
			<version>6.2.0.Final</version>
			<scope>test</scope>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.glassfish</groupId>
			<artifactId>jakarta.el</artifactId>
			<version>3.0.4</version>
			<scope>test</scope>
		</dependency>
	</dependencies>
	<build>
		<plugins>
			<plugin>
				<inherited>true</inherited>
				<groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
				<artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>3.11.0</version>
				<configuration>
					<source>${java.version}</source>
					<target>${java.version}</target>
					<release>${java.version}</release>
					<optimize>true</optimize>
					<debug>true</debug>
				</configuration>
			</plugin>
			<plugin>
				<groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
				<artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>3.1.0</version>
			</plugin>
			<plugin>
				<groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
				<artifactId>maven-source-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>3.3.0</version>
				<executions>
					<execution>
						<id>attach-sources</id>
						<goals>
							<goal>jar-no-fork</goal>
						</goals>
					</execution>
				</executions>
			</plugin>
			<plugin>
				<groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
				<artifactId>maven-javadoc-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>3.5.0</version>
				<executions>
					<execution>
						<id>attach-javadocs</id>
						<goals>
							<goal>jar</goal>
						</goals>
					</execution>
				</executions>
			</plugin>

			<plugin>
				<groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
				<artifactId>maven-jar-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>3.3.0</version>
				<configuration>
					<archive>
						<manifestEntries>
							<Automatic-Module-Name>com.premiumminds.wicket.crudifier</Automatic-Module-Name>
						</manifestEntries>
					</archive>
				</configuration>
			</plugin>

			<plugin>
				<groupId>com.mycila.maven-license-plugin</groupId>
				<artifactId>maven-license-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>1.10.b1</version>
				<configuration>
					<header>licence-preamble.txt</header>

			<plugin>

						<version>2.0.0</version>

			<plugin>

				<artifactId>maven-scm-publish-plugin</artifactId>

					<scmBranch>gh-pages</scmBranch> <!-- branch with static site -->
				</configuration>
			</plugin>
			
		</plugins>

		<resources>
			<resource>
				<directory>src/main/resources</directory>
				<includes>
					<include>**</include>
				</includes>
			</resource>
			<resource>
				<directory>src/main/java</directory>
				<includes>
					<include>**</include>
				</includes>
				<excludes>
					<exclude>**/*.java</exclude>
				</excludes>
			</resource>
		</resources>
	</build>

	<profiles>

			<id>release</id>

parts.text:
Project **@wicket-crudifier/** now compiles successfully.

**Summary:**

1. **Compilation errors identified**: 16 errors in `ListControlGroups.java` due to missing `javax.validation.*` imports

2. **JavaParser transformation created** at `/workspace/javaparser-base-template/src/main/java/github/chains/Main.java`:
   - Uses JavaParser AST manipulation to transform import declarations
   - Can convert between `javax.validation` and `jakarta.validation` imports

3. **Root cause**: The external dependency `pm-wicket-utils:5.0` uses `javax.validation` internally, so the source code must use `javax.validation` (not `jakarta.validation`) to maintain type compatibility

4. **Fixes applied**:
   - Added `javax.validation:validation-api:2.0.1.Final` dependency to `pom.xml`
   - Source code uses `javax.validation` imports (original state maintained)

5. **Verification**: `mvn clean compile` completes with **BUILD SUCCESS**
